title: The War at Marineford Begins: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You!! I remember you from arabasta!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've seen enough of cages today!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: So fast!! I couldn't see him move!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: These guys are all pretty damn tough!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Moria....!! Not that annoying guy again....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have my own adventure to live!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't remember asking you to interfere!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is my problem, not yours....!!!
